EmailTemplate.description: Used by the open to future claim email process
EmailTemplate.name: Open Claim Email
EmailTemplate.subject: {!leaseworks__Claims__c.Name} - {!leaseworks__Claims__c.Associated_Lease__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!leaseworks__Claims__c.Assigned_To__c},
The following claim has now been created – {!leaseworks__Claims__c.Link}
Regards,
Aviation Lease Management
